heading: Answer Questions on Your Data
body:
This section demonstrates how to implement RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) in your
application with MongoDB Vector Search and LlamaIndex. Now that you've learned
how to run vector search queries to retrieve semantically
similar documents, run the following code to use
MongoDB Vector Search to retrieve documents and a LlamaIndex [query engine](https://docs.llamaindex.ai/en/stable/module_guides/deploying/query_engine/)
to then answer questions based on those documents.

Basic RAG

RAG with Filtering
